policyitem.name: BSD-3-Clause
policyitem.desc: Opus codec is licensed under BSD 3-Clause License, which is compatible with OpenHarmony.

policyitem.name: BSD-3-Clause
policyitem.desc: Source code files must include the BSD-3-Clause license header.

policyitem.name: Xiph.Org
policyitem.desc: Copyright header must include Xiph.Org Foundation copyright notice.

policyitem.name: README, README.OpenSource
policyitem.desc: The repository must contain README and README.OpenSource files.

policyitem.name: archive
policyitem.desc: DNN model evaluation uses tar archives to store test vectors, required for correctness validation.
Patent declaration referencing IETF IPR statements; project license is defined in COPYING.

filteritem.name: .git/.*
filteritem.desc: Exclude Git metadata directory.

filteritem.name: .idea/.*
filteritem.desc: Exclude IDE configuration files.

filteritem.name: .vscode/.*
filteritem.desc: Exclude VS Code configuration files.

filteritem.name: LICENSE_PLEASE_READ.txt
filteritem.desc: Patent declaration referencing IETF IPR statements, not a standard software license.

filteritem.name: dnn/torch/osce/stndrd/evaluation/.*
filteritem.desc: DNN model evaluation directory containing test vector archives.

filteritem.name: .*\.log
filteritem.desc: Exclude log files.

filteritem.name: .*\.tmp
filteritem.desc: Exclude temporary files.

filteritem.name: update_version
filteritem.desc: opus default description

filteritem.name: dred_vectors.sh
filteritem.desc: Test shell script for DRED test vectors, contains no licensable content.

filefilter.name: binaryFileTypePolicyFilter
filefilter.desc: Filters for binary file type policies

filteritem.name: .*\.png|.*\.jpg|.*\.jpeg|.*\.gif|.*\.svg|.*\.ico
filteritem.desc: Exclude image files from binary type check.

filteritem.name: .*\.pdf|.*\.doc|.*\.docx|.*\.xls|.*\.xlsx|.*\.tar|.*\.txt
filteritem.desc: Exclude PDF and Office documents from binary type check.

filteritem.name: dnn/torch/osce/stndrd/evaluation/nbwe_dcr1\.tar
filteritem.desc: DNN model evaluation test vector archive.

filteritem.name: dnn/torch/osce/stndrd/evaluation/tests/NBWE_ACR\.tar
filteritem.desc: DNN model evaluation test vector archive.

filteritem.name: dnn/torch/osce/stndrd/evaluation/tests/dred_journal\.tar
filteritem.desc: DNN model evaluation test vector archive.

filteritem.name: dnn/torch/osce/stndrd/evaluation/tests/lace\.tar
filteritem.desc: DNN model evaluation test vector archive.

filteritem.name: dnn/torch/osce/stndrd/evaluation/tests/nolace\.tar
filteritem.desc: DNN model evaluation test vector archive.

filefilter.name: licenseFileNamePolicyFilter
filefilter.desc: Filters for license file name policies

filteritem.name: .*\.txt
filteritem.desc: Text files may contain license information.

filteritem.name: .*\.md
filteritem.desc: Markdown files may contain license information.

filteritem.name: testdata/.*
filteritem.desc: Exclude test data files.

filteritem.name: third_party/.*
filteritem.desc: Exclude third-party source code embedded in the repository.
